# Perla Lutchman

> Miami-based brand strategist and luxury real estate advisor. Two focused offerings under one name: brand strategy & consulting, and luxury residential + pre-construction real estate in Miami.

## About
Perla Lutchman brings 12+ years of entrepreneurial and business experience and an MBA to every client relationship. Originally from Venezuela and raised in Trinidad & Tobago, she works from Miami. Affiliated with Avanti Way Realty LLC.

## Sites
- [Brand Strategy](branding.html): Brand development, positioning, business strategy, and customer experience for entrepreneurs, professionals, and growing businesses. Journey stages: Vision, Launch, Momentum, Growth, Legacy.
- [Luxury Real Estate](/): Luxury residential and pre-construction real estate across Miami, with early access to pre-construction developments. Affiliated with Avanti Way Realty LLC.

## Miami Areas (neighborhood real estate guides)
- [Brickell](areas/brickell/): Miami's financial district; walkable luxury condos with strong rental yields.
- [Edgewater](areas/edgewater/): Waterfront towers on Biscayne Bay; one of Miami's fastest-rising luxury neighborhoods.
- [Downtown Miami](areas/downtown-miami/): The connected urban core; culture, transit, and accessible luxury pricing.
- [Coral Gables](areas/coral-gables/): Historic Mediterranean estates, top schools, tree-lined luxury.
- [Miami Beach](areas/miami-beach/): Oceanfront condos and trophy homes from South of Fifth to Bal Harbour.
- [Wynwood](areas/wynwood/): Arts district turned residential hub; new short-term-rental-friendly development.

## New Developments (pre-construction & new-development guides)
- [Parkside Residences](developments/parkside-brickell/): Pre-construction condo-hotel in West Brickell; short-term-rental friendly.
- [The Standard Residences Brickell](developments/the-standard-residences-brickell/): Branded riverfront tower with deep lifestyle amenities; delivery 2027.
- [NoMad Residences Wynwood](developments/nomad-residences-wynwood/): Completed, hospitality-branded, short-term-rental-friendly residences in Wynwood.
- [Viceroy Brickell Residences](developments/viceroy-brickell-residences/): Viceroy-branded luxury tower in Brickell; under construction.
- [ELLE Residences Miami](developments/elle-residences-miami/): World's first ELLE-branded residences in Edgewater; pre-construction.
- [The Standard Residences Midtown](developments/the-standard-residences-midtown/): Completed, move-in-ready branded pieds-a-terre in Midtown with flexible 30-day rentals.
- [Domus Brickell Park](developments/domus-brickell-park/): Completed, turnkey West Brickell condo-hotel with a built-in short-term-rental program.
